Interface NotificationService

All Known Implementing Classes:
JdbcNotificationService, MockNotificationService
public interface NotificationService
Service interface for managing in-app notifications.

  • Property Summary

    Properties
    Type
    Property
    Description
    javafx.beans.property.ReadOnlyIntegerProperty
    unreadCount
    Returns a read-only property that reflects the current number of unread notifications.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addNotification(String message, NotificationType type)
    Creates and prepends a new unread notification.
    javafx.collections.ObservableList<NotificationEntry>
    getNotifications()
    Returns all notifications, newest first.
    void
    markAllAsRead()
    Marks all notifications as read and resets the unread count to zero.
    void
    markAsRead(NotificationEntry entry)
    Marks a single notification as read, decrementing the unread count.
    javafx.beans.property.ReadOnlyIntegerProperty
    unreadCountProperty()
    Returns a read-only property that reflects the current number of unread notifications.

  • Property Details

    • unreadCount

      javafx.beans.property.ReadOnlyIntegerProperty unreadCountProperty
      Returns a read-only property that reflects the current number of unread notifications.
      See Also:
      • unreadCountProperty()

  • Method Details

    • getNotifications

      javafx.collections.ObservableList<NotificationEntry> getNotifications()
      Returns all notifications, newest first.
      Returns:
      observable list of notification entries

    • addNotification

      void addNotification(String message, NotificationType type)
      Creates and prepends a new unread notification.
      Parameters:
      message - notification message text
      type - notification category or severity

    • markAsRead

      void markAsRead(NotificationEntry entry)
      Marks a single notification as read, decrementing the unread count. No-op if already read.
      Parameters:
      entry - notification to mark as read

    • markAllAsRead

      void markAllAsRead()
      Marks all notifications as read and resets the unread count to zero.

    • unreadCountProperty

      javafx.beans.property.ReadOnlyIntegerProperty unreadCountProperty()
      Returns a read-only property that reflects the current number of unread notifications.
      Returns:
      unread count property
